title: About Scabies
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Scabies is a skin infestation caused by the human itch mite.
Common symptoms include intense itching and a pimple-like itchy rash.
Scabies commonly spreads by direct, prolonged skin-to-skin contact.
Crowded settings and institutional outbreaks require special public-health handling.
